output.answer: There are no caves in Wikidata with a depth of at least 3.1 km (3100 meters). The deepest known cave, Krubera-Voronja, has a depth of approximately 2.19 km (2191 meters).
output.formatted:
There are no caves in Wikidata with a depth of at least 3.1 km (3100 meters). The deepest known cave, Krubera-Voronja, has a depth of approximately 2.19 km (2191 meters).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?cave WHERE {
  ?cave wdt:P31 wd:Q492 ; wdt:P1525 ?depth .
  FILTER(?depth >= 3100)
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
